title: Vector (disambiguation)
content:
'''Vector''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Jedi Vector]]''', a [[starfighter]] utilized by the [[Jedi Order]] during the [[High Republic Era]].
*'''''[[Vector]]''''', an [[Imperial Gozanti-class cruiser|Imperial ''Gozanti''-class cruiser]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Vector (convor)|Vector]]''', a [[Convor/Legends|convor]].
*'''[[Vector (game)|Vector]]''', a game.
*'''[[Vector Hyllus]]''', a [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] [[Joiner]].
*'''[[Vector Prime]]''', a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] term.
*[[Vector (Star Destroyer)|'''''Vector''''']], a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]].
*'''[[Unidentified Bith starship dealer]]''', whose name in French is "Vector."

==Out-of-universe==
*'''''[[Star Wars: Vector]]''''', a comic storyline.
*'''''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''''', a novel.
